name: deadbolt
description: Keyless, evidence-backed security audits for repositories you own.

interface.shortDescription: Audit code you own with evidence, not guesses.
interface.longDescription: A keyless Codex Skill for source-code security audits. It does not invoke Deadbolt's API-backed TypeScript engine or claim its patch-and-reanalysis loop.
defaultPrompt: Use $deadbolt to audit this repository read-only and report only evidence-backed findings.
